selected_title: Constitutional Engineering in Brazil: The Politics of Federalism and Decentralization
question: How does the evidence in “Constitutional Engineering in Brazil: The Politics of Federalism and Decentralization” constrain claims about transfer from individual to organizational learning?

evidence_spans.text: List of Figures and Tables - Acknowledgements - Acronyms - Introduction - The Role of the Federal Government - The Decision to Decentralize - Conflicts and Alliances - Decentralization at Subnational Level - The Case of Bahia State - The Case of Salvador and Camacari - Conclusions: Intergovernmental Relations, Decentralization, and Federalism in a Fragmented Policy - References - Index
